economic_notes: First Nation holds 51% share in a joint venture for various construction projects. Major Manitoba Schools Initiative construction in progress ($51.8M). Wastewater Treatment Plant Upgrade in progress ($13.6M). Water and Wastewater Piping Infrastructure to New School Project in progress ($12.7M). Management Action Plan approved by INAC in 2016 implemented via BDO Canada LLP resulting in negotiated debt settlements.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 — not 2024. Province is Manitoba (MB). The entity consolidates 8 related entities including Wasagamack Health Authority, Wasagamack Employment & Training, Mehkana Development Corporation, Wasagamack Wass Mart, Wasagamack Bulk Fuel, Atchitamo Development Inc., and Teepee Radio Station. Large construction in progress balance of $88M primarily driven by Manitoba Schools Initiative ($51.8M). Net debt position of -$1,752,270. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Debt forgiveness of $1,034,397 appeared in 2019 comparative but not in 2020. COVID-19 subsequent event noted. Salaries per expenses by object note ($11,443,562) differs slightly from segment totals ($11,408,768) due to rounding. Annual debt service represents repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement.
